title: jyswee/easytyga
summary: Tunnel your local AI to the internet - now with SSH and Docker over raw TCP. Secure, API-key auth, one command. Works with Ollama, OpenClaw, vLLM, and any HTTP service.

summary: GmanNodes - Auto Movie Director: type a movie idea, get a finished short film with sound. ComfyUI custom node pack (Ollama screenwriter + LTX 2.3 scenes + storyboard approval + auto-stitch).

summary: Unified AI platform for industrial document intelligence, knowledge retrieval, and operational insights.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: maz557/coding-agent-free
summary: Interactive AI coding agent using free OpenRouter models with real tool calling

title: The-Strategy-Unit/synthesis
summary: Turn scattered knowledge into a searchable knowledge base. Ingest → transcribe → distil → embed → search.

title: pioneerdotai/pioneer
summary: Local-first AI assistant runtime with native desktop, self-hosted gateway, MCP, memory, tools, tasks, and BYO models. Built in Rust.

summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: go-yanka/lathe
summary: A reproducible, spec-driven build harness for LLM code generation - treat AI codegen like a build system, not a conversation.

title: nasdomak/freecad-agent

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: Primo-Studio/openclaw-memoria

title: Peuqui/AIfred-Intelligence

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
